modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unknown YuJa Admin appears in D2L Course Offerings.

full_description_text: So, there’s this name, YuJa Admin, showing up in the Dropbox of D2L Course Offerings. It’s not clear where it came from. The user was just checking the class list when they noticed it. It’s a bit confusing and unexpected, right?
short_description: Unknown YuJa Admin appears in D2L Course Offerings.
description: So, there’s this name, YuJa Admin, showing up in the Dropbox of D2L Course Offerings. It’s not clear where it came from. The user was just checking the class list when they noticed it. It’s a bit confusing and unexpected, right?
